response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct song performances and one talk segment. 2. Song 1: "ANIMA", originally by ReoNa. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title and artist. Found full lyrics. 3. Song 2: "Idol", originally by YOASOBI. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title. Found full lyrics. 4. Performer identified as Tsunomaki Watame (both songs) and Shirakami Fubuki (second song). 5. Created JSON structure with identified metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by Tsunomaki Watame of the song 'ANIMA' (originally by ReoNa), followed by an MC/talk segment, and concludes with a performance of the song 'Idol' (originally by YOASOBI), featuring Shirakami Fubuki.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame performs the song 'ANIMA'. The performance includes dancing and visual effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
魂の色は 何色ですか
「もういっそ 折れたままで」
捨てるほど 逃げ出すほど
強くないよ ほら
もう一度 鼓動、高鳴る
何が正しいかなんて
わからないけど
形のないものばかりが
大切になって行く
飾らない言葉だけが
強く結ばれてる
また 躓いて 転がって
それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ 傷ついて 強がって
それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
深い地の底で一人
扉と鍵を探す
おとぎ話は ほら
泡の様に全部消えて
葛藤、残像だけ
次の頁へ
伸びてく枝葉が分かれて
それぞれの道を行く
寂しい思い出だけが
強く根を張ってる
また 貫いて 失って
それでも挫けない
心はどこに 器はどこに
ただ残されて抜け落ちて
それでも伝えたいよ
魂の日々を 魂の意志を
ずっと ずっと

赤い色ですか 青い色ですか
魂の色は 魂の色は
何色ですか 何色ですか
透明な過去に
不透明な明日に
生きるあなたは 何色ですか
また 躓いて 転がって
それでも砕けない

ただ 傷ついて 強がって
それでも見つけたいよ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color is the soul?
"Just give up already"
I am not strong enough
To just throw it away and run
Look, my heartbeat is rising again
I don't know what is correct
But the things that have no form
Become the most important
Only the unadorned words
are tied strongly
I stumble and fall again
Yet I don't shatter
What color is the soul?
Just getting hurt and acting tough
Yet I still want to find it
I am confirming the shape of the soul
Alone at the bottom of the deep earth
Searching for the door and the key
The fairy tale, look
has all disappeared like bubbles
Only the conflicts and afterimages
remain to the next page
The growing branches separate
and go their own ways
Only the lonely memories
have taken deep root
I pierce and lose again
Yet I do not give up
Where is the heart? Where is the vessel?
Just left behind and falling out
Yet I still want to convey it
The days of the soul, the will of the soul
Always, always
What color is the soul?
Is it red? Is it blue?
What color is the soul?
What color is the soul?
What color is it?
In the transparent past
In the opaque tomorrow
What color is the soul of you who lives on?
I stumble and fall again
Yet I don't shatter
What color is the soul?
Just getting hurt and acting tough
Yet I still want to find it
I am confirming the shape of the soul
Always, always, always, always

scenes.description: An MC/talk segment where the performer addresses the audience.
Tsunomaki Watame and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'Idol'.
